subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Send forth the reverberations of God's remembrance unto all horizons, and diffuse the melody of eternal grace within every heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی دمدمه ذکرالله را در آفاق اندازید و زمزمه فیض ابدی را در قلب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
